title: verbascum tetrandrum
intro: Verbascum tetrandrum, also known as the common mullein, is a biennial or perennial plant that belongs to the figwort family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of mucilage and saponins. The health benefits of Verbascum tetrandrum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Verbascum tetrandrum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
